name: insane-design-codex
description: Codex-native design system extraction, apply, and build workflow with a bundled corpus.

interface.shortDescription: Extract and reuse real design systems in Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `insane-design` workflow with the bundled example corpus, helper scripts, starter components, and the clean Codex contract for `design.md` generation.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this site and generate a reusable design.md plus report.ko.html.
Use insane-design to extract real CSS tokens from this URL and summarize the design system.
Build a new artifact from this design.md and starter-component set.
